message: TechnicianPerformance time window + SLA times: new Window Start (O2) and Window End (P2) controls slice technician metrics to any period — a week, a sprint, a quarter — and two new columns show Avg SLA Response (hrs) and Avg SLA Resolution (hrs) per technician. All metrics scope to the window; Open and Aged 30+ are reconstructed as of the window end. Defaults to school-year-start through today.
